chemo.name: Cytarabine (Ara-C)
notes: Inject SC in abdomen or thigh; rotate sites
Monitor CBC for cytopenias — dose delay may be required
Observe for local skin reactions or irritation
Useful for elderly or unfit patients unable to tolerate high-dose chemotherapy

nursingNotes: Indication: AML maintenance in older or unfit patients
Monitor CBC every 1–2 weeks during early cycles
Educate patient/caregiver on proper SC injection technique if home administration is used
Low emetogenic risk — antiemetics usually not needed
Assess for neurotoxicity even at low doses (rare but possible)
